item.name: Lady's Cameo
item.description:
Initially named after a famous piece of jewelry, it has since become a favorite among goldsmiths crafting pieces of their own.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: So beautiful did folk find the silvery spiral of this conch that they likened it to a shimmering jewel─specifically the priceless one which slipped through the careless fingers of Princess Edvya and bounced into the ocean as she skipped across the deck of the royal galleon.
